risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain persistently high, creating an ongoing constraint on project implementation in South Sudan's fragile context.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Government Implementation Partner
risk_summary: Substantial institutional capacity gaps identified within the Ministry of Agriculture and Food Security, with a capacity needs assessment revealing staffing skills deficiencies at national and state levels that could impede project delivery.
evidence_quote: An important capacity need assessment of MAFS staffing skills and gaps was conducted and provided a number of recommendations to enhance the technical abilities of the extension staff at the national and state level.

risk_title: Displacement and Refugee Pressures on Project Beneficiary Base
risk_summary: Project design includes specific indicators for reaching returnees and refugees, suggesting displacement dynamics are affecting the target population and requiring crisis response mechanisms to support vulnerable displaced populations.
evidence_quote: Number of returnees reached with assets and services (Number) - Comments: Returnees are farmers who were residing in the target area before and are back after being out of their country... Number of Refugees reached with assets and services (Number) - Comments: Refugee are farmers who are forced to leave their country and are currently living in the project target areas.

risk_title: Crisis Response Window Activation Indicating Acute Shocks
risk_summary: Significant portion of project beneficiaries (47,444 farmers) are being supported through the Crisis Response Window Emergency Response Fund, indicating acute humanitarian pressures and food insecurity crises affecting implementation areas.
evidence_quote: 47,444 farmers (66% female) were supported using the Crisis Response Window Emergency Response Fund (CRW/ERF)

risk_summary: Project includes specific flood response interventions targeting vulnerable populations affected by flooding, indicating climate-related shocks compounding existing fragility and creating additional implementation pressures.
evidence_quote: Percentage of vulnerable populations reached with flood response interventions (percentage) - Comments: This indicator measures the number of farmers who are affected by flood and who have received inputs/equipment/training supported by the project financed by the CRW ERF funds.
